somali.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Dhis • Nuqul • Qor • Turjun • Isbeddel • CRISPR • Sayniska garsoorka
somali.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A wuxuu la lammaanaa T (2 bond), G wuxuu la lammaanaa C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) waxay ka xalliyeen qaabkan X-ray crystallography. Qaabkaas wuxuu muujinayaa sida DNA isu nuqulo oo loo akhriyo.
somali.replicate_unzip_copy_rezip: Nuqul — fur, nuqul, mar labaad xir
somali.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase wuxuu kala qaybiyaa strand-yada; DNA polymerase wuxuu dhisaa strand dhammaystiran. Semi-conservative — helix cusub kastaa wuxuu leeyahay strand hore mid + mid cusub. Meselson iyo Stahl waxay caddeeyeen tan 1958.
somali.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase wuxuu akhriyaa DNA strand 3′→5′ wuxuuna dhisaa RNA 5′→3′. Xarfuhu waa isku mid, kaliya T wuxuu noqdaa U. mRNA wuxuu qaataa cunto-karinta ilaa ribosome — tallaabada koowaad ee central dogma.
somali.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code way badan tahay). AUG wuu bilaabaa; UAA/UAG/UGA way joojiyaan. tRNA wuu akhriyaa codon, keenaa amino acid saxda ah, dhisaa peptide bond.
somali.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — hal xaraf ayaa la beddelay. Insertion/deletion — reading frame wuu dhaqaaqaa, protein-ka hoose oo dhan wuu kharibmaa. Sickle cell anemia waa hal A→T oo keliya — hal xaraf, saameyn nolol oo dhan.
somali.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: Nidaamka difaaca bakteeriyada ayaa dib loo isticmaalay. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = maqas molecular ah. Doudna + Charpentier waxay ku guuleysteen Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy-gii ugu horreeyay (sickle cell) FDA waxay ansixisay Diseembar 2023.
somali.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence wuxuu go'aamiyaa qaab-dhismeedka kaas oo go'aamiya shaqada. Hemoglobin wuxuu qaadaa O₂, antibody way aqoonsadaan, enzyme way catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) wuxuu saadaaliyay qaab-dhismeed 200 milyan — dhibaato 50 sano ah waxaa la xalliyay 18 bilood gudahood.
somali.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Sayniska garsoorka — STR profiling + caddayn DNA
somali.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS wuxuu isticmaalaa short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Suurtagalnimada isbarbaryaacaanka waa mid quadrillion marka loci-yada oo dhan is-waafaqaan. Innocence Project — xukumaad ka badan 245 oo qalad ah ayaa la burinayay tijaabada DNA dembiga kadib.
somali.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Ku celceli transcription, translation, kala-saarista mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (marmar RNA) waa saldhigga gudbinta macluumaadka hidaha. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
somali.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Ku-celcelinta soo-ceshashada — qaab ciyaar. Xawaaraha wuxuu dhisaa automaticity — marka eegista codon table ay noqoto mid iskeed u dhacda, working memory-gaagu wuxuu noqdaa mid xor ah fikirka heerka sare, sida saadaalinta saameynta mutation.
somali.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — oo ay ku jiraan retrovirus (HIV) oo dib u socda reverse transcriptase. Crick wuxuu abuuray erayga "dogma" 1957; markii dambe wuxuu yiri macneheedu waa mala-awaal, ma aha run aan la dafiri karin.
somali.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Dooro sequence — strand dhammaystiran waxaa lagu buuxiyaa base pairing (A-T, G-C). DNA dhabta ah sidan ayaa had iyo jeer loo dhisaa.
somali.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase wuxuu furaa helix; DNA polymerase wuxuu akhriyaa template strand kasta oo dhigaa dhammaystirkiisa. Semi-conservative — daughter strand kastaa wuxuu leeyahay hore mid + cusub mid.
somali.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase wuxuu akhriyaa template strand. Sharcigii isku midka ahaa ee complementarity, laakiin T → U. Natiijada — hal mRNA copy oo single-strand ah, oo diyaar u ah inuu ka baxo nucleus.
somali.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome wuxuu akhriyaa codon (base 3 mar walba). codon kasta → amino acid mid. Genetic code waxaa loo akhriyaa triplet aan is-dul-saarnayn, aan haysan comma.
somali.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein ma beddelmo), missense (amino acid mid ka duwan), nonsense (joojin hore). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) inta badan waa mid wax kharribta.
somali.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA wuxuu tilmaamaa Cas9 target 20-base ah. Cas9 wuxuu gooyaa labada strand. Repair pathway-yada unugga waxay xiraan hidde ama waxay ku daraan template aad bixisay.
somali.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (laalaab 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Beddelka hal amino acid wuu kharribi karaa laalaabka.
somali.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Suurtagalnimada isbarbaryaacaanka aan kala sooc lahayn loci-yada oo dhan waa qiyaastii mid bilyan. Waxaa lagu isticmaalaa CODIS, paternity test, iyo forensic lab.
somali.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Halxiraale DNA cusub session kasta. Turjun, aqoonso mutation, hel ORF ama xalli kiis forensic ah. Streak counter wuxuu la socdaa guusha maalinlaha ah.
somali.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Tartan xawaare turjumaad. Decode codon si dhakhso ah adigoo la tartamaya saacadda. Tijaabi in genetic code uu maskaxdaada ku jiro, ee aan reference card oo keliya ku jirin.
somali.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, sharciyada base pairing, ereyada muhiimka ah (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet aad mar kale eegi karto.
somali.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA waa copy ee coding strand halkaas oo U uu qaato meesha T. (RNA polymerase wuxuu akhriyaa complementary template strand 3'→5', wuxuuna bixiyaa sequence la mid ah coding strand.)
somali.press_start_to_begin: Riix Start si aad u bilowdo...
somali.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ Lama helin PAM site (NGG). Isku day DNA sequence kale oo ka yimid Build tab.
somali.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Waxaa la abuuray double-strand break! Dooro repair pathway:
somali.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) waa gene-editing technology oo ka soo jeeda difaaca difaaca bakteeriyada.
somali.a_20nt_rna_that_directs_cas9_to_the_ta: — RNA ~20nt oo hagaya Cas9 ilaa target
somali.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). Loo baahan yahay binding.
somali.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, injineernimada dalagga, moodooyin cudur.
somali.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
somali.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
somali.run_transcription_and_translation_firs: Marka hore socodsii Transcription iyo Translation!
somali.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Mid kastaa wuxuu muujinayaa DNA sequence gaaban ka hor/ka dib isagoo iftiiminaya isbeddelka. Dooro nooca saameynta — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, ama in-frame indel. Doorashada kadib, coaching wuxuu sharaxaya sababta saameyntan ay uga suurtagal badan tahay kuwa kale.
somali.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Inta badan phosphorylated.
somali.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Wuxuu dhisaa disulfide bond (S-S). Muhiim u ah protein folding.
somali.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid-ka ugu weyn.
somali.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site ee enzyme badan (pKa ~7).
somali.polar_amide_common_n_glycosylation_sit: Polar amide. N-glycosylation site caadi ah.
somali.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Inta badan acetylated/methylated.
somali.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — ugu degenerate.
somali.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Ugu yar. Ma jiro side chain — flexibility sare.
somali.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase wuxuu furaa double helix ee replication origin. Single-strand binding protein waxay ka hortagaan re-annealing. Topoisomerase wuxuu dhimaa supercoil tension hortiisa fork.
somali.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase wuxuu dhigaa RNA primer gaaban (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase wuxuu u baahan yahay 3'-OH si uu u extend, sidaas darteed ma bilaabi karo strand cusub isagu.
somali.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: Waxaa loo synthesize si joogto ah 5'→3' jihada isku mid ah ee uu replication fork u dhaqaaqo. primer mid origin kasta.
somali.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: Waxaa loo synthesize sida fragment gaagaaban 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) sababtoo ah polymerase wuxuu extend kaliya 5'→3'. fragment kastaa wuxuu u baahan yahay primer-kiisa.
somali.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: RNA primer waa la gooyaa waxaana lagu bedelaa DNA nucleotide.
somali.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Wuxuu isku xiraa Okazaki fragment isagoo dhisaya phosphodiester bond-kii ugu dambeeyay.
somali.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase wuxuu hubiyaa base kasta; mismatch waa la saaraa lagana bedelaa. Wuxuu dhimaa error rate laga bilaabo ~10⁻⁵ ilaa ~10⁻⁷.
somali.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Wuxuu qabtaa mismatch-yada yar ee ka baxsanaya proofreading. error rate-ka ugu dambeeya — ~10⁻¹⁰ base pair kasta.
somali.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase wuxuu ku xiraa promoter (tusaale TATA box ~25 bp upstream ee transcription start). Wuxuu kaalmeeyaa melt DNA double helix.
somali.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase wuxuu akhriyaa template strand 3'→5' wuxuuna synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. Bakteeriyada wuxuu ku daraa ~nucleotide 30 ilbiriqsi kasta; ~10-50 eukaryote.
somali.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Bakteeriya — rho-dependent ama intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage iyo polyadenylation signal.
somali.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: 7-methylguanosine cap waxaa lagu daraa 5' end. Wuxuu ka caawiyaa ribosome inuu aqoonsado mRNA + ilaaliya degradation.
somali.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: Intron waa la saaraa, exon-ka waxaa isku xira spliceosome. Alternative splicing → protein badan hal hidde.
somali.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: adenine nucleotide ~100-250 waxaa lagu daraa 3' end. Wuxuu xasiliyaa mRNA + calaamadeeyaa export-kiisa.
somali.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA bisaylay wuxuu ka baxaa nuclear pore ilaa cytoplasm.
somali.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit wuxuu ku xiraa mRNA. Initiator tRNA (qaadaya Met) wuxuu ku xiraa start codon AUG. Large subunit wuu ku biiraa.
somali.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Wareeg kasta — aminoacyl-tRNA wuu galaa A site → peptide bond waa la dhisaa (23S rRNA catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome wuu dhaqaaqaa codon mid → tRNA wuu aadaa A→P→E.
somali.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) waxaa aqoonsada release factor. Peptide waa la sii daayaa, ribosome wuu kala baxaa.
somali.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) waxay ka caawiyaan protein inuu si sax ah u laalaabto. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
somali.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon wuu beddelmaa, laakiin amino acid waa isku mid (genetic code redundancy). Ma jirto saameyn.
somali.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon wuu beddelmaa → amino acid ka duwan. Saameyn laga bilaabo midna ma jirto (conservative substitution) ilaa mid daran (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
somali.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon wuu beddelmaa → STOP codon. Protein waa la gooyaa, inta badan non-functional.
somali.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Wuxuu ku daraa nucleotide. Haddii aanay ahayn multiple ee 3, reading frame wuu dhaqaaqaa → codon-yada hoose oo dhan way beddelmaan. Inta badan daran.
somali.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Wuxuu saaraa nucleotide. Natiijada frameshift la mid ah insertion.
somali.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Nuqullo dheeraad ah oo hidde ama gobol. Waxay keeni karaan dosage effect (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 dheeraad ah).
somali.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: Qayb ka mid ah chromosome ayaa la rogay. Wuxuu kharribi karaa hidde breakpoint.
somali.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Qayb waxay u guurtaa chromosome kale. Caan — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
somali.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Unug ku celcelisan (tusaale CAG) wuu ballaadhaa jiilalka. Huntington (CAG HTT), fragile X (CGG FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
somali.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Lammaane 1-22 (lagu tiriyay qiyaastii cabbir, oo leh ka reeban — chr. 21 wuu ka yar yahay chr. 22).
somali.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (dheddig) ama XY (lab). Y aad buu u yar yahay, wuxuu qaadaa hidde yar (~70) marka la barbardhigo X (~800).
somali.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Lammaane 23 (diploid somatic cell). Gamete waa haploid (chromosome 23, ma jiro lammaane).
somali.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Yar si layaab leh — hidde badan waxay soo saaraan protein badan iyada oo loo marayo alternative splicing. Inta badan genome waa regulatory ama non-coding.
somali.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Haddii la kala bixiyo, ~1.8 m oo DNA ah unug kasta. Waxaa lagu xardhaa nucleus ~10 µm ah histone + supercoiling.
somali.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: Waxaa laga dhaxlaa hooyada. Wuxuu code hidde 37 (protein 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Nuqullo badan mitochondrion kasta.
somali.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Wuxuu kordhiyaa qayb DNA gaar ah 2ⁿ (wareegyo n). Wuxuu isticmaalaa Taq polymerase oo u adkaysta kulaylka. Saldhigga molecular biology-ga casriga ah.
somali.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Wuxuu akhriyaa DNA sequence isaga oo isticmaalaya chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Hadda inta badan waxaa lagu bedelay next-generation sequencing.
somali.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — wuxuu sequence malaayiin fragment isku mar. Illumina wuu xukumaa. Read length ~100-300 bp, balaayiin run kasta.
somali.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA wuxuu hagaa nuclease Cas9 ilaa DNA gaar ah. Cut wuxuu sameeyaa gene knockout ama HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
somali.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Wuxuu tafatiraa hal base la'aan double-strand break. off-target effect ka yar Cas9.
somali.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protein bakteeriya oo gooya DNA sequence gaar ah 4-8 bp. Waxay suurtogal ka dhigeen recombinant DNA technology. Nobel 1978.
somali.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Wuxuu isku xiraa DNA fragment iyada oo loo marayo phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase waa cloning workhorse.
somali.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Wuxuu kala saaraa DNA fragment cabbir electric field. fragment yar wuxuu si dhakhso ah ugu dhaqaaqaa gel matrix.
somali.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Kumanaan DNA probe chip. Wuxuu cabbiraa gene expression ama detect SNP parallel.
somali.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Wuxuu sequence mRNA unug shaqsi ah. Wuxuu daaha ka qaadaa cell-type heterogeneity ee bulk RNA-seq uu seego.
somali.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Qaab-dhismeed near-atomic ee RNA/DNA complex crystallization la'aan. Xoog u leh ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
somali.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length ilaa 100 kb+ (oo ka soo horjeeda ~300 bp ee Illumina). Ka wanaagsan structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
somali.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Taranka kala duwan oo ku salaysan variation la dhaxli karo. Hidaha wanaajiya survival/reproduction waxay noqdaan kuwo caan ah jiilalka.
somali.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Isha bakhtiyaa nasiibka ah ee genetic variation cusub. Inta badan neutral ama waxyeello leh; dhif ah faa'iido leh. substrate-ka selection.
somali.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Isbeddellada bakhtiyaa nasiibka ah ee allele frequency, gaar ahaan population yar. Founder effect + bottleneck waa tusaalooyin xad-dhaaf ah.
somali.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Dhaqdhaqaaqa allele ee u dhexeeya population iyada oo loo marayo migration. Wuxuu dhimaa farqiga u dhexeeya population; kordhiya diversity gudaha population.
somali.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Samaynta species cusub, sida caadiga ah iyada oo loo marayo reproductive isolation. Allopatric (kala qaybsanaan juqraafi) waa ugu caansan.
somali.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Noolaha aan xiriir lahayn waxay si madax-bannaan u evolve astaamo isku mid ah (baalal shimbiraha, fiidmeerta, cayayaanka; il vertebrate + cephalopod).
somali.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Nolosha oo dhan waxay wadaagaan awoowe caadi ah (LUCA). Caddayn — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry aasaasi ah oo la wadaago.
somali.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Jaantus muujinaya xiriirka evolution. Waxaa laga dhisaa in badan isbarbardhigga DNA sequence halkii morphology.
somali.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency wuxuu joogsan yahay hoos yimaada malo-awaalka no-evolution — population weyn, random mating, ma jiro selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
somali.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Tixraacyo is-dhexgal ah — dooro mawduuc hoose si aad u sahamiso.
somali.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: shan nitrogenous base ayaa ka sameysma DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) waxay leeyihiin ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) waxay leeyihiin 1. Pairing sida H-bond pattern gaar ah.
somali.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) waxay code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code way badan tahay (degenerate) — inta badan amino acid waxay leeyihiin codon badan, inta badan ka duwan booska saddexaad ("wobble"). Universal ku dhawaad nolosha oo dhan.
somali.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Booska codon saddexaad wuxuu ku lammaanaa adkaan yar — hal tRNA wuxuu aqoonsan karaa codon badan. Wuxuu dhimaa tirada tRNA loo baahan yahay (cell wuxuu leeyahay ~30-40, ma aha 64).
somali.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — helix cusub kastaa wuxuu leeyahay parental mid + newly-synthesized strand mid. Meselson-Stahl waxay muujiyeen 1958. ~50 bp/ilbiriqsi bakteeriyada; ~50 bp/ilbiriqsi fork eukaryote (laakiin kumanaan fork parallel).
somali.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase wuxuu akhriyaa DNA template (3'→5') wuxuuna synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). Eukaryote, primary transcript waxaa loo process si weyn ka hor export.
somali.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome wuxuu akhriyaa mRNA sida 3-base codon wuxuuna dhisaa protein. ~10-20 amino acid/ilbiriqsi bakteeriyada; ~3-5 eukaryote. Ribosome badan waxay translate karaan mRNA isku mid ah (polyribosome).
somali.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation waxay u dhaxeeyaan kuwa aan la arki karin (silent) ilaa kuwa dhimasho. Saameyntoodu waxay ku xiran tahay waxa is beddelay, halka, iyo cell type-ka.
somali.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Muunad cilladaha hidaha oo si fiican loo qeexay. Kheyraadka genetic counseling iyo therapy-ga hadda way korayaan — go'aannada clinical eeg suugaanta hadda.
somali.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Qoys A — saddex jiil, indho buluug
somali.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Laba waalid oo aan la saameyn (gen. I) waxay leeyihiin hal ilmo oo la saameeyay + hal aan la saameyn (gen. II). Ilmo la saameeyay + lammaane aan la saameyn waxay leeyihiin hal la saameeyay + hal aan la saameyn (gen. III). Astaantu waxay ka muuqataa qiyaastii 25% carruurta cross-ka kuwa aan la saameyn.
somali.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Astaantu waxay ka boodaa jiilalka (waalid aan la saameyn → ilmo la saameeyay).
somali.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Waalidku waa inay noqdaan heterozygous carrier oo mid kastaa gudbiyo recessive allele mid.
somali.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Dadka la saameeyay waxay ka muuqdaan labada jinsi frequency qiyaastii isku mid ah.
somali.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: La saameeyay = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) waa phenotypically kuwa aan la saameyn.
somali.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Qoys B — indho-la'aan midab saddex jiil
somali.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Awoowe la saameeyay (gen. I) wuxuu leeyahay gabar aan la saameyn (gen. II) iyo awoow la saameeyay iyada oo loo marayo gabadhaas (gen. III). Ma jiro wiil la saameeyay oo ka yimid aabbe aan la saameyn. Astaantu waxay ka muuqataa in badan raggii.
somali.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: Astaantu waxay muujisaa male bias xoog leh (hemizygous rag ayaa muujiya; haween waxay u baahan yihiin nuqul 2).
somali.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: Gabadha aan la saameyn ee awoowe la saameeyay waa carrier khasab ah.
somali.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: Astaantu waxay ka boodaa jiil iyada oo loo marayo gabadha carrier, ka dibna waxay mar kale ka muuqataa awoowga.
somali.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Ma jiro father-to-son transmission (wiilashu waxay ka dhaxlaan Y aabbaha, ee ma aha X).
somali.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Qoys C — astaan si dib ah u bilaabma sida Huntington
somali.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Qof kasta oo la saameeyay wuxuu leeyahay ugu yaraan hal waalid oo la saameeyay. Astaantu waxay ka muuqataa jiil kasta. ~50% carruurta ka timaadda waalid la saameeyay waa la saameeyay. Sinnaan rag + haween.
somali.trait_appears_in_every_generation_no_s: Astaantu waxay ka muuqataa jiil kasta (ma boodo).
somali.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Qof kasta oo la saameeyay wuxuu leeyahay ugu yaraan hal waalid oo la saameeyay.
somali.roughly_50_of_children_of_an_affected_: ~50% carruurta heterozygote la saameeyay waa la saameeyay.
somali.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency sinnaan ah rag + haween — autosomal, ma aha sex-linked.
somali.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — labadaba waa in la xaqiijiyo ka hor reveal. Reveal wuxuu qiimeeyaa ranking-gaaga tallaabo-tallaabo, ma aha jawaabtaada ugu dambeysa oo keliya. Baaritaanka dhabta ah wuxuu doonayaa inaad ogaato sababta, ee ma aha waxa oo keliya.
somali.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. U kala sooc sharraxaadyadan (ugu badan → ugu yar taageero):
somali.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Ogow — ranking grade wuxuu madax-bannaan yahay pattern grade — waad ogaan kartaa waxa sax ah laakiin sababta u dhig nidaam qaldan.
somali.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Inta lagu jiro samaynta gamete, labada allele ee hidde kasta way kala baxaan, si gamete kastaa u qaato allele mid.
somali.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele hidde kala duwan waxay assort si madax-bannaan midba midka kale inta lagu jiro samaynta gamete (hidde chromosome kala duwan).
somali.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Marka laba allele oo kala duwan jiraan, mid (dominant) wuu muuqdaa halka kan kale (recessive) uu qariyo.
somali.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: Methyl group (–CH₃) waxaa lagu daraa cytosine, gaar ahaan CpG island. Inta badan wuxuu aamusiyaa gene expression.
somali.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation ee histone tail. Wuxuu beddelaa chromatin packaging.
somali.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex waxay siibaan ama tuuraan nucleosome si ay u muujiyaan DNA.
somali.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA waxay xakameeyaan gene expression post-transcriptionally.
somali.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Hidde qaar waxay ka muuqdaan maternal ama paternal allele oo keliya. Methylation mark.
somali.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: epigenetic mark qaar waxay ka badbaadaan gametogenesis oo u gudbaan offspring.
somali.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Yaa geli kara genome-kaaga? GINA (2008, US) wuxuu mamnuucayaa genetic discrimination shaqada + health insurance, laakiin ma aha life insurance.
somali.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA waxay muujiyaan ancestry + health risk. Walaac — incidental finding, saxnaan, wadaagista data third party.
somali.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Sanadkii 2018 He Jiankui wuxuu tafatiray embryo HIV resistance → mataano ayaa dhashay. Si weyn ayaa loo cambaareeyay. Dalal badan ayaa mamnuucaya germline editing.
somali.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Xulasho ama tafatir mala-awaal ah oo embryo astaamo aan caafimaad ahayn (dherer, IQ). Hadda waxay xaddidan tahay farsamo; muran ku jira anshaxa.
somali.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: Loo farsameeyay inuu ku faafo wild population (tusaale malaria resistance kaneecada). Ecological aan la beddeli karin ayaa dhici karta.
somali.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Miyaan test u samaynaa cudurada aan la dawayn karin (Huntington)? Qaar waxay doortaan inaanay ogaan.
somali.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search waxay xalliyeen cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) laakiin waxay kiciyaan su'aalo ku saabsan privacy qaraabada aan oggolaan.
somali.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) wuxuu xukumay in DNA dabiici ah aan la patent karin, laakiin synthetic cDNA waa la karaa.
somali.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome taariikh ahaan waa Eurocentric. Dadaallada lagu hagaajinayo reference diversity way socdaan (tusaale human pangenome project).
somali.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Cabbirka genome kuma xiriiro adkaanta organism (C-value paradox). Bini'aadamku wuxuu leeyahay gene count sida roundworm — inta badan DNA "dheeraad" genome weyn waa non-coding.
somali.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Isbeddello la dhaxli karo oo gene expression la'aan isbeddel DNA sequence. Deegaanka, nafaqada, walaaca ayaa saameeya.
somali.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Qaybaha dhismaha protein. 9 waa "essential" (lama synthesize karo — waa in laga helo cuntada) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
somali.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: Asaas ahaan ma jirto beneficial fixation la filayo. Population waxay ku jirtaa mutation-selection balance ama drift oo keliya.
somali.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift wuu xukumaa — fixation yar oo la filayo, inkastoo mutation dhaco. Caadi ah population yar.
somali.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: beneficial mutation yar oo la filayo inay fixed noqdaan. Halbeeg population dabiici ah oo badan.
somali.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: fixation badan oo la filayo — strong selection, population weyn, ama labadaba. Tusaale antibiotic resistance bakteeriya.
somali.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime xad-dhaaf ah — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. adaptive sweep badan isku mar.
somali.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Dej per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, iyo selection coefficient. Saadaali immisa beneficial mutation ayaa dhab ahaan fixed noqonaya. Ma jiro score, ma jiro reveal.
somali.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — goobo = regime caadi ah
somali.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Malo-awaalkaaga (slider-kee ayaa saameyn ugu weyn ku leh fixation rate? Maxay?)
somali.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: tusaale selection wuxuu leeyahay leverage ka badan μ marka N uu ku filan yahay weyn...
somali.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Goorma ayuu regime u dhaqaaqaa drift-dominated ilaa selection-dominated? Maxaa N·s kuu sheegayaa?
somali.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Maxay antibiotic resistance iyo viral evolution u degdeg badan yihiin — slider-kee ayaa ku jira xadkiisa?
somali.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) wuxuu leeyahay fixation probability 1/(2N). Maxay taasi u macnaysaa large population?
somali.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Ma noqon kartaa population size isku mid ah "drift-dominated" weak mutation iyo "selection-dominated" strong isku mar?
somali.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Waan sharxi karaa sababta isku-darka μ × N × g × s uu u abuuro regime-kan.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — ma jiro score, ma jiro reveal, ma jiro answer dump. Wuxuu isticmaalaa Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), oo interpolate u dhexeeya Haldane ~2s strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) iyo neutral 1/(2N) drift limit (Ns≪1 ama s=0).
somali.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Ka badan bini'aadamka (~20,000). Hidde novel badan sensory perception + cognition.
somali.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protein gaar ah (Dsup) wuxuu duubaa DNA wuxuuna ka ilaaliyaa dhaawaca X-ray. Cilmi-baaris radiotherapy application.
somali.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Kansar aad u dhif ah.
somali.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Maroodiga waxay leeyihiin nuqul ~20 tumor suppressor TP53 (bini'aadamku wuxuu leeyahay 1). Sharraxaad suurtogal ah heerka kansar hooseeya inkastoo cell count weyn.
somali.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl wuxuu dib u koraysiin karaa addimo, spinal cord, wadne, xitaa qaybo maskaxda. Cilmi-baaris regenerative medicine.
somali.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Wuxuu kaydiyaa dufan, ma aha biyo (khuraafaad). Wuxuu u oggolaadaa inuu badbaado toddobaadyo cunto la'aan. Biyaha waxaa laga helaa cabbitaan + metabolic byproduct.
somali.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population wuu burburay ~sano 12,000 kahor. Genetic bottleneck → diversity aad u hooseeya. Shabeel kastaa waa genetically ku dhawaad mataano.
somali.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Nibiriga casriga ah waxay ka soo jeedaan naasleyda dhulka (~sano milyan 50 kahor). Qaraabada ugu dhow ee nool — jeer. Vestigial pelvic bone weli way jiraan.
somali.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Kala duwanaansho ballaadhan. Adder's-tongue fern — lammaane ~720 (ugu badan la diiwaangeliyay). Bariis — lammaane 12. Bini'aadam — lammaane 23.
somali.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Dhammaan dheddig, asexual muddo ~sano milyan 80. Waxay ka helaan hidde species kale (HGT) halkii kala duwanaansho sex.
somali.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Kalluun lobe-finned ah oo loo malaynayay inuu dabar go'ay tan iyo waagii dinosaur. Muunado nool ayaa la helay 1938. Farac ~sano milyan 400.
somali.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Buluug (copper-based hemocyanin). Wuxuu detect bacterial endotoxin — waxaa loo isticmaalaa test vaccine + medical device.
somali.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Waxay ka duwanaadeen brown bear ~sano 150,000-500,000 kahor. Qaar grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" ama "grolar") ayaa la xaqiijiyay duurka.
somali.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics noocyada eyga + xaqiiqooyinka DNA duurjoogta
somali.vertebrate_classes_subset_of_chordata: Vertebrate class (qayb ka mid ah Chordata)
somali.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Hormoonadu waxay ku safraan dhiig-wareega si ay uga shaqeeyaan target tissue fog. Waxay isku dubbariidaan metabolism, koritaan, taran, stress response, iyo homeostasis.
somali.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Ka-koobnaanta curiye qiyaastii ee jirka bini'aadamka mass. 11 curiye oo keliya ayaa ah >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) waxay sameeyaan ku dhawaad organic molecule oo dhan.
somali.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Dabar-go'yada dhawaan (inta badan bini'aadam sababay) + dabar-go'yo taariikh-hore caan ah. Dhulku wuxuu lahaa mass extinction 5 — badankood waxay yiraahdaan waxaan hadda ku jirnaa 6aad.
somali.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + iftiin → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll ayaa kaxeeya. Isha inta badan oxygen jawiga.
somali.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (dhir badan), C4 (galley, sokor — hufan T sare), CAM (cactus, succulent — furaan stomata habeenkii si ay u kaydiyaan biyo).
somali.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Godad yaryar oo caleenaha. Waxay u oggolaadaan CO₂ gudaha + O₂/biyo dibadda. Furan/xiran iyagoo ku salaysan iftiin, biyo, CO₂.
somali.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Wuxuu qaadaa biyo + macdan kor ka xididada. Unugyada way dhinteen. Wuxuu abuuraa transpiration pull.
somali.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Wuxuu qaadaa sokor caleenaha ilaa qaybaha kale ee geedka. Unugyadu waa nool. Laba-jiho.
somali.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Hormoon dhir. Phototropism (koritaan xagga iftiinka). concentration dhinaca hooska → unugyadu way dheeraadaan → u qalloocaan iftiinka.
somali.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Hormoon gaas. Wuxuu bislaysiiyaa miraha. Sababta moos bisil uu u bislaysiiyo miraha kale. Stress signaling.
somali.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Wuxuu kor u qaadaa dhererka jirridda, biqilka abuurka, ubaxaynta.
somali.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Wuxuu kor u qaadaa qaybinta unugga. Wuxuu dib u dhigaa gaboowga caleenta.
somali.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Hormoon stress. Wuxuu xiraa stomata marka biyaha yaraadaan. Wuxuu kor u qaadaa hurdada abuurka.
somali.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm waa mid gaar ah — hal sperm wuxuu bacrimiyaa egg cell (embryo), kan kalena wuxuu bacrimiyaa polar nuclei (endosperm — cunto abuurka).
somali.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Qaabka ubaxa, midab, ur ayaa u dhigma doorbidka pollinator. Qaar aad u specialized ah (orchid + balanbaalis gaar ah).
somali.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Waxay ku koreen carro nafaqo-yar. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (dhagxan).
somali.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis fungi la'. Fungi waxay ballaariyaan gaadhista xididka; geedku wuxuu bixiyaa sokor. ~85% plant species.
somali.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bakteeriya root nodule, waxay u beddelaan N₂ → NH₃. Waa sababta digir + digir ay protein-badan yihiin + hagaajiyaan carrada.
somali.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Rabaayadaynta waxay dooratay abuur weyn (bariis), aan dhicin (sarreen), miro macaan (tufaax). Dhawaan — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
somali.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Caadi dhirta (dhif xayawaanka). Sarreenku waa hexaploid (set 6), strawberry waa octoploid. Inta badan wuxuu kordhiyaa vigor + yield.
somali.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Isku-darka adkeeya darbiga unugga alwaaxda. Waa sababta alwaaxdu ay u adag tahay + si tartiib ah u qudhmo.
somali.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Doorka species ecosystem-kiisa. Laba species ma qaadan karaan niche mid ah (competitive exclusion).
somali.physical_place_where_an_organism_lives: Meesha jireed ee organism ku noolyahay.
somali.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Shabakadda kii cuna kii. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → iwm.
somali.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Waxay sameeyaan cuntadooda. Dhir, algae, bakteeriya qaar. Saldhigga food chain.
somali.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Waxay cunto ka helaan cunista kuwa kale. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
somali.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Waxay burburiyaan waxyaabaha dhintay. Fungi, bakteeriya, decomposer. Waxay recycle nafaqada.
somali.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Is-dhexgal dhow oo u dhexeeya species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
somali.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Saameyn aan saami ahayn ecosystem inkastoo tirada yar. Otter badeed wuxuu xakameeyaa sea urchin, kuwaas oo xakameeya kelp.
somali.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size ugu badan ee deegaanku qaadi karo. Resource, predation, disease waxay xaddidaan K.
somali.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population wuxuu koraa heer joogto ah. dN/dt = rN. Ma sii socon karo weligiis.
somali.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Koritaanku wuu gaabiyaa marka N uu ku dhawaado K. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve qaab S.
somali.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Faro badan, daryeel waalid yar, cimri gaaban. Cayayaan, geed xun. Boom-and-bust.
somali.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Faro yar, daryeel badan, cimri dheer. Nibiri, bini'aadam, geed oak.
somali.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Isbeddello la saadaalin karo oo bulshada waqti. Primary (dhagax madhan) vs. secondary (kadib carqalad).
somali.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Kala-duwanaanshaha nolosha. Species richness (tiro) + evenness (qaybin). Biodiversity sare → ecosystem resilience.
somali.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 milyan sano kasta. Heerka hadda waa 100-1000× background bini'aadam awgeed.
somali.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Aag nolol weyn oo lagu qeexo cimilo + dhir. Tropical rainforest, saxare, tundra, savanna, iwm.
somali.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → dib N₂ (denitrification).
somali.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel wuxuu dib ugu celiyaa C la aasay muddo dheer jawiga.
somali.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Uumi-baxa → uumi-gurange → roob → qulqul/biyo dhulka hoostiisa → dib badda.
somali.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Dhaqdhaqaaqa curiyayaasha (C, N, P, S) iyada oo loo marayo biotic + abiotic compartment.
somali.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: Mid kastaa waxaa loo doortay sifooyin ka dhigaya bayoolaji mid la maareyn karo — cabbir, fast life cycle, koritaan fudud, genetic tool.
somali.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Kulaylku wuxuu kala saaraa double-stranded DNA single strand. Hydrogen bond way jabaan.
somali.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) waxay ku xiraan gobolka dhammaystiran ee template strand kasta.
somali.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — ka yimid Thermus aquaticus) wuxuu extend primer wuxuuna synthesize DNA cusub.
somali.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Wareeg kastaa wuxuu labanlaabaa target DNA. wareeg 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
somali.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis wuxuu hindisay PCR (1983); wuxuu ku guuleystay Nobel 1993.
somali.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Ka yimid thermophilic bacterium ilaha biyaha kulul. Wuxuu ka badbaadaa denaturation step ee 95 °C.
somali.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye waxay ka warbixiyaan amplification real-time. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa COVID test, gene expression.
somali.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Wuxuu u beddelaa RNA cDNA marka hore. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa RNA virus (COVID, HIV, hargab).
somali.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Wuxuu u qaybiyaa sample kumanaan droplet. Wuxuu tiriyaa jiritaan/maqnaan — quantification sax ah oo aad u sax ah.
somali.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (sida Jurassic Park; dhab ahaan inta badan <milyan sano 1).
somali.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy ugu horreeya FDA-approved (Diseembar 2023). Wuxuu tafatiraa patient stem cell ex vivo.
somali.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR wuxuu farsameeyaa T cell si ay u weeraraan cancer. Phase I/II trial badan.
somali.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library wuxuu muujiyaa hidde-kee essential u ah cudur.
somali.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Ka dhakhso badan knockout mouse dhaqameed. Waxaa si weyn loogu isticmaalaa cilmi-baaris.
somali.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Bariis u adkaysta cudur, boqoshaad aan bunni noqon, sarreen gluten-free (inta badan weli cilmi-baaris).
somali.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Waxay faafiyaan madhalays ama malaria resistance iyada oo loo marayo wild population. Field trial weli muran ku jira.
somali.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) wuxuu tafatiray human embryo → cadho moral + scientific. Hadda waa la mamnuucay dalal badan.
somali.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Jirka bini'aadamku wuxuu leeyahay ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Ku dhawaad sinnaan tiro.
somali.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ mindhicirka qof qaangaar ah oo caafimaad qaba. Iyo archaea, fungi, virus.
somali.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome wuxuu qaadaa hidde ~100× ka badan human genome. Wuxuu ku daraa awoodo metabolic badan.
somali.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe waxay la xiriiraan maskaxda iyada oo loo marayo vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. Waxaa lala xiriiriyaa mood, dhaqan — laakiin sheegashooyin gaar ah oo badan waa la buunbuuniyay.
somali.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic waxay tirtiraan commensal → soo kabashadu waxay qaadan kartaa bilo/sano. Qaar shift way sii jiraan.
somali.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) wuxuu daaweeyaa recurrent C. difficile infection ~90% kiisaska. Isticmaalada kale weli experimental.
somali.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Wuu ku kala duwan yahay body site — foolka (saliid, Cutibacterium acnes xukuma), mindhicir (anaerobe), kilkilaha (dhidid apocrine + bakteeriya → ur jirka).
somali.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Caafimaad — Lactobacillus xukuma, pH hooseeya. Isku-dheelitirnaan la'aan → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
somali.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Wuxuu saameeyaa qudhunka ilkaha, cudurka ciridka. Waxaa lala xiriiriyaa cardiovascular risk.
somali.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Dhalmada siilka waxay ku abuurtaa ilmaha maternal vaginal microbe; C-section skin microbe. Saameynta muddada dheer waa la barayaa (qaar muran ku jira).
somali.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Wuxuu ka kooban yahay live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) oo quudiya gut microbe gaar ah (B. infantis).
somali.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg way isku dhegaan. Diploid zygote ayaa sameysma.
somali.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Qaybinta unugga degdeg ah koritaan la'aan. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
somali.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Kubbad godan oo leh inner cell mass (embryo mustaqbalka) + trophoblast (placenta mustaqbalka).
somali.blastocyst_attaches_to_uterine_wall: Blastocyst wuxuu ku dhegaa darbiga makaanka.
somali.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Dhaqdhaqaaqa unugga wuxuu sameeyaa germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
somali.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube wuxuu ka sameysma ectoderm. Maskaxda mustaqbalka + spinal cord.
somali.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Dhammaan xubnaha waaweyn waxay bilaabaan inay sameysmaan. Wadnuhu wuxuu bilaabaa inuu garaaco ~toddobaad 4-5.
somali.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: Koritaan + qaangaarnimo. Qaab-dhismeedka waaweyn ayaa horeba u sameysmay.
somali.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell waxay soo saaraan growth signal-kooda si ay u activate receptor si constitutively.
somali.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) ma shaqeeyaan → unugyadu way qaybsamaan inkastoo stop signal.
somali.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway waa la joojiyay. unugyada dhaawacan way nool yihiin markay tahay inay dhintaan.
somali.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → telomere waa la ilaaliyaa → qaybin aan xad lahayn.
somali.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor waxay qortaan xididada dhiigga si ay u quudiyaan mass koraya.
somali.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: unugyadu waxay lumiyaan adhesion, way haajiraan, way gumaystaan tissue fog.
somali.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor wuxuu isticmaalaa glycolysis xitaa oxygen.
somali.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor wuu ka dhuuntaa ama cabudhiyaa immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
somali.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: Barar joogto ah wuxuu abuuraa deegaan ogolaansho leh.
somali.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation ururaya + chromosomal rearrangement waxay kaxeeyaan evolution.
somali.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Degdeg, non-specific. Maqaar, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
somali.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Gaabis (maalmo), aad u specific, leh memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
somali.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Waxay soo saaraan antibody. B cell kastaa wuxuu sameeyaa specificity mid. B cell firfircoon waxay noqdaan plasma cell.
somali.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Waxay isku dubbariidaan immune response. target ee HIV. Waxaa loo hagaa naive ilaa specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
somali.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Waxay dilaan unugyada la'baaray ama cancer iyada oo loo marayo perforin + granzyme.
somali.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein qaab Y. class 5 — IgG (ugu badan), IgA (mucosa), IgM (bilow), IgE (xasaasiyad + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
somali.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule oo u soo bandhigaya antigen T cell. MHC I (unugyada oo dhan, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
somali.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein oo ka daloosha pathogen + qorta phagocyte.
somali.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule ee immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (isku-dubbarid), TNF (barar).
somali.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell cimri dheer oo ka yimid soo-gaadhis hore. Saldhigga vaccine + difaac nolol oo dhan.
somali.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Waxay tababaraan adaptive immunity cudur la'aan. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
somali.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system wuxuu weeraraa naftiisa. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
somali.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell waxay sii daayaan histamine.
somali.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (helaan), soma (cell body), axon (dira), terminal (sii daaya neurotransmitter).
somali.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium gudaha → depolarize → potassium dibadda → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) ilaa ~100 m/s (myelinated).
somali.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation dufan ah oo ay sameeyeen glia (oligodendrocyte CNS, Schwann cell PNS). Wuxuu dedejiyaa conduction. Wuxuu ku baabba'aa MS.
somali.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction u dhexeeya neuron. Electrical ama chemical (inta badan). Gap ~0.02 µm.
somali.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
somali.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Hooseeya Parkinson; dysregulated schizophrenia.
somali.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, hurdo, cunto-doonis. SSRI waxay bartilmaameedsadaan reuptake.
somali.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Hooseeya Alzheimer.
somali.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
somali.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — fikir, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (shucuur + memory).
somali.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Maskaxdu waxay dib isu habaysaa — ugu xoog badan carruurnimada, laakiin way sii socotaa nolol oo dhan. Saldhigga learning.
somali.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction u dhexeeya brain capillary cell waxay dibadda ku hayaan inta badan molecule. Caqabad weyn drug delivery ilaa CNS.
somali.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% tamarta jirka marka nasto (inkastoo ay tahay ~2% mass). Inta badan Na+/K+ pump oo ilaaliya ion gradient.
somali.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protein bini'aadam ugu horreeya oo si tiro badan loo soo saaray. Waxaa lagu sameeyay E. coli (1982). Wuxuu beddelay insulin doofaar + lo'.
somali.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
somali.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application horumar ku jira.
somali.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Waxay beddelaan hidde cillad leh. Luxturna (indho-la'aan dhaxal, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
somali.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell la farsameeyay. Yescarta + Kymriah blood cancer. ~$400,000 dose.
somali.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant waa halbeeg sanado. newer iPSC + ESC approach cilmi-baaris.
somali.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue living cell + scaffold. Maqaar, cartilage, kelli. Xubno buuxa weli fog.
somali.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Farsame biological system. Bakteeriya soo saara dawo, yeast soo saara opioid, algal biofuel.
somali.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
somali.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample xumaaday), Y chromosome (khadka aabbaha). Isbarbardhig database.
somali.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Waxay muujiyaan biogeographic ancestry + qaraabo DNA.
somali.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA dhiigga. Ogaansho hore, treatment monitoring.
somali.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Daawee solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved 2024.
somali.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe la farsameeyay waxay nadiifiyaan daadinta saliidda, wasakhda caagga, biraha culus.
somali.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Wuxuu kordhiyaa DNA sequence gaar ah bilyan jeer. workhorse ee molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
somali.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Asal ahaan bacterial immune system, hadda programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier waxay wadaageen Nobel 2020.
somali.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus waa non-living infectious agent — waxay u baahan yihiin host cell si ay u tarmaan. Waxaa lagu kala saaraa genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, qaab.
somali.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science wuxuu si dhakhso ah u horumarayaa. Sheegashooyin caan ah oo badan (probiotic strain gaar ah oo "daaweeya" xaalad gaar ah) waxay ka horreeyaan caddaynta. Ku dheg natiijooyinka si xoog ah dib loo soo saaray.
somali.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — waxa mid kastaa sameeyo
somali.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Waxaa qeexay Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, cusboonaysiin 2011). Cancer badan waxay helaan astaamo badan. Therapy wuxuu bartilmaameedsadaa astaamo gaar ah oo ka badan.
